channel.title: Ruby on Mike Ball
channel.description: Recent content in Ruby on Mike Ball

item.title: Using OptionParser in Rake
item.description: How to use Ruby OptionParser in Rake

item.title: Rails API Integration Tests
item.description: A simple pattern for authoring integration tests for a Rails app.

item.title: A Simple Ruby Class Example
item.description: A basic Ruby class example to illustrate a few of the language's features.

item.title: wp2middleman
item.description:
wp2middleman is a Ruby gem that migrates the Wordpress posts in a Wordpress XML export file to middleman-style markdown files.

wp2middleman provides a wp2mm commandline executable, as well as a WP2Middleman module.

View source and documentation on Github »

item.title: Lobber
item.description:
Lobber is a simple command line utility used to quickly upload a directory to Amazon S3.

Lobber is built with Ruby and can be downloaded from Rubygems.

View its source code on GitHub »

item.title: Streamlined Rails Gem Updates on Gem in a Box
item.description: Some small shell scripts to automate manual gem downloads & uploads.

item.title: Using the phl_geocode Ruby Gem
item.description: An overview of a small Ruby gem I built on Philadelphia's public geodata.

item.title: Lobbying.ph
item.description: Leveraging open data to track Philly lobbying efforts.
